name: GitHub Pull Requests
description: Shows up to 5 of your open GitHub pull requests inline under the session list, refreshing both on a timer and the instant a session opens/merges/closes a PR (it watches session output for a pull url or a merged/closed line), via the gh CLI — the PRs you opened across all your repos, including org repos, or a single repo over HTTP — plus a dialog listing them in a searchable, sortable grid with an "Assigned to me" filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
author: Cockpit
